title: Hemchand Yadav Vishwavidyalaya Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Hemchand Yadav Vishwavidyalaya Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Hemchand Yadav Vishwavidyalaya Result 2026 declared for BBA 1st, 3rd and 5th semester (Regular/Private/EX/Supply-ATKT) and MA/MSc Home Science, MA Geography, MA Political Science 1st and 3rd semester on the official website - durguniversity.ac.in on 24-03-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Hemchand Yadav Vishwavidyalaya result.

content.text: Hemchand Yadav Vishwavidyalaya, Durg has released the Hemchand Yadav Vishwavidyalaya Result 2026 for multiple UG and PG programmes for the latest examination session. The newly declared results include BBA 1st, 3rd and 5th semester (Regular/Private, EX, Supply/ATKT) along with M.Sc Home Science (Food Science and Nutrition, Human Development, Textile and Clothing), MA Geography, MA Home Science and MA Political Science 1st and 3rd semester (Regular/Private and Supply/ATKT, New Syllabus where applicable). Hemchand Yadav Vishwavidyalaya Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - durguniversity.ac.in.

Students can check and download their semester wise results through the university’s online result portal by selecting the course and semester and entering their roll number or other login credentials. After viewing the marksheet, candidates must verify their personal information, subject-wise marks, total marks and result status (Pass/Fail/ATKT) and contact the university or their college in case of any discrepancy.

sections.heading: Hemchand Yadav Vishwavidyalaya Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: The university has issued a consolidated update for UG BBA and several PG programmes in Home Science, Geography and Political Science, covering both first and third semesters. Results have been provided for multiple categories such as Regular/Private, EX and Supply/ATKT, ensuring that current batch students as well as backlog candidates can see their updated academic status.

rows: PG Courses - Home Science & Political Science

sections.heading: Hemchand Yadav Vishwavidyalaya Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: All the above results are hosted on the common online result portal, where separate links exist for each course, semester and category (Regular/Private, EX, Supply/ATKT). Students can directly open their specific result using the links already provided or by navigating via the main result page.

sections.heading: How to Download Hemchand Yadav Vishwavidyalaya Result 2026

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download your Hemchand Yadav Vishwavidyalaya Result 2026:

items: Visit the official result page https://durg.ucanapply.com/result-details.

On the result interface, select your exam type and course, such as: BBA 1st/3rd/5th Semester (Regular/Private/EX/Supply/ATKT) M.Sc Home Science (FSN/HD/TC) 1st or 3rd Semester (Regular/Private) MA Geography 1st or 3rd Semester (Regular/Private/Supply/ATKT, New Syllabus) MA Home Science 1st or 3rd Semester (Regular/Private) MA Political Science 1st or 3rd Semester (Regular/Private/Supply/ATKT)
BBA 1st/3rd/5th Semester (Regular/Private/EX/Supply/ATKT)
M.Sc Home Science (FSN/HD/TC) 1st or 3rd Semester (Regular/Private)
MA Geography 1st or 3rd Semester (Regular/Private/Supply/ATKT, New Syllabus)
MA Home Science 1st or 3rd Semester (Regular/Private)
MA Political Science 1st or 3rd Semester (Regular/Private/Supply/ATKT)
Click on the corresponding result link to open the result input page.
Enter your Roll Number/Enrollment Number and any captcha/security code shown.
Click on Search/View Result to display your subject wise marks, total marks, SGPA (if applicable) and overall result status.
Download or print the provisional marksheet for your records and for use in further academic activities such as next semester admission or form filling.
